inline_comments.message: My personal preference would be to move the existing clamp charts using git mv instead of introducing new chart from scratch to preserve the history unless you expect both clamp/components/clamp-backend and this chart to coexist?

Krzysztof, yes the mistake comes from me, 
Initially i thought we wanted to keep the previous clamp , but it's not the case (Martial asked me to remove it).

I'll do a move instead, but i have to change some of the files to align policy-clamp on the policy project.
Moreover policy clamp is going to use the same database than policy now, so it's not a simple move.
